prompts.text: Name each letter as they trace: "That's the letter [X] — it makes the '[sound]' sound."
Describe the motion as they trace: "Start at the top, go down, then across" — narrating builds letter formation memory.
When the word is complete, say it together slowly, pointing to each letter: "c-a-t — cat!"
Ask: "Can you think of another word that starts with [letter]?"
